name: scratch-mcp
description: Edit, run and test Scratch .sb3 projects from an AI agent.
long_description: An MCP server, built on scratch4js, that lets an agent edit Scratch `.sb3` projects (sprites, scripts data, costumes, sounds, variables, lists) and **run and test** them in a headless TurboWarp VM — reading back structured state (variables, sprite positions, say/think bubbles, monitors) and an event timeline, with no browser needed. It can also live-reload edits and capture screenshots in TurboWarp Desktop when the companion userscript is installed.

bridge_port.title: Live-reload bridge port
bridge_port.description: Port for the TurboWarp Desktop live-reload + screenshot bridge. If the port is busy the server still runs; only live reload and screenshots are disabled.

tools.name: open_project
tools.description: Load an .sb3 file from disk into memory for editing.

tools.name: save_project
tools.description: Write the open project back to an .sb3 file (and live-reload it).

tools.name: project_info
tools.description: Summarize the open project: targets, extensions, monitors and meta.

tools.name: list_sprites
tools.description: List every sprite with its position, size and media.

tools.name: get_target
tools.description: Full details for one target (a sprite or the stage).

tools.name: set_sprite
tools.description: Update properties of a sprite (position, size, direction, visibility, …).

tools.name: add_sprite
tools.description: Add a new, empty sprite.

tools.name: remove_sprite
tools.description: Delete a sprite and any assets only it used.

tools.name: rename_target
tools.description: Rename a sprite (or the stage).

tools.name: set_stage
tools.description: Update stage-level properties: tempo, video, volume.

tools.name: set_variable
tools.description: Create or update a variable on a target by name.

tools.name: delete_variable
tools.description: Delete a variable from a target by name.

tools.name: set_list
tools.description: Create or replace a list on a target by name.

tools.name: delete_list
tools.description: Delete a list from a target by name.

tools.name: add_broadcast
tools.description: Add a broadcast message to the project.

tools.name: add_costume
tools.description: Add a costume to a target from an image file on disk.

tools.name: remove_costume
tools.description: Remove a costume from a target by name.

tools.name: add_sound
tools.description: Add a sound to a target from an audio file on disk.

tools.name: remove_sound
tools.description: Remove a sound from a target by name.

tools.name: reload
tools.description: Tell connected TurboWarp Desktop userscripts to load an .sb3 from disk.

tools.name: run_project
tools.description: Press the green flag in connected TurboWarp Desktop userscripts.

tools.name: stop_project
tools.description: Stop running in connected TurboWarp Desktop userscripts.

tools.name: vm_load
tools.description: Load the open project into a headless Scratch VM for running and testing.

tools.name: vm_green_flag
tools.description: Press the green flag in the headless runtime.

tools.name: vm_run
tools.description: Advance the headless VM, then return state plus an event timeline.

tools.name: vm_stop
tools.description: Stop every running script in the headless VM.

tools.name: vm_state
tools.description: A structured snapshot of the headless VM's current runtime state.

tools.name: vm_input
tools.description: Feed keyboard/mouse input and answers into the headless VM.

tools.name: screenshot
tools.description: Capture a PNG of the live stage from a connected TurboWarp Desktop editor.
